name: deepseek-mirror
description: DeepSeek 镜像站 · 自建 DeepSeek Chat 镜像服务，逆向前端 SPA 与私有 API 协议，以账号池 + WASM PoW 求解直连上游，无需官方 API Key。实验性项目。 / Self-hosted DeepSeek Chat mirror. Reverse-engineers the frontend SPA and private API protocol, uses account pool + WASM PoW solving to connect upstream — no official API key required. Experimental.
